creator: mellon@pobox.com
text:
A funny spelling typo in a man page.
Location: sbin/reboot/boot_i386.8
The word 'initialization' on line 158 is misspelled
as 'inititialization'.

Fix: 

s/inititialization/initialization/g

-- 
Anatoly Vorobey,
mellon@pobox.com http://pobox.com/~mellon/
"Angels can fly because they take themselves lightly" - G.K.Chesterton
